lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: And where do you come from, traveller?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: We've been having more human visitors in the city recently, there is another one over there. Perhaps you'll want to talk to her.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: There is a lot of knowledge stored in this library, you know.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Help? What kind of help do you mean?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Looking for a book? A manuscript? Knowledge?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: I'll leave you to your browsing, then.
